title: Strategist, Agent Development
requirements_met: Product strategy + customer insight: led GTM, positioning, messaging at Minima; user-facing product marketing
Coordinate technical + non-technical stakeholders: worked across dev, marketing, ops, founders for 6 yrs
Outstanding communication: PR (Bloomberg/Yahoo, 2M views), 40K X following, keynotes
Drive execution of complex multi-workstream projects: ran presale ($4.5M), ambassador programme (75K nodes)
Direct exposure to building AI agents: currently building agents with Claude Code (conversational/agentic)
gaps: Strong software-development understanding expected; Ryan codes (Python/TS) but is not a professional engineer
No prior conversational-AI-agent design at enterprise scale (thousands of conversations/day)
In-person San Francisco-primary culture; London office exists but intensity/in-person expectation high
preferred_met: Data-driven strategic insight: data analytics background (Amazon Alexa failure analysis, GA)
Trusted-advisor / customer-facing orientation from founder-facing GTM work

required_skills.calculation: 40 * (5/5) = 40 (communication, stakeholder coordination, execution, product strategy, agent exposure all met)

experience_fit.calculation: 8 yrs generalist fits; enterprise agent-development depth partial relative to role expectations

industry_match.calculation: Agentic AI (top-choice) - Sierra is a leading AI agent platform (Bret Taylor / Clay Bavor)

location_match.calculation: London office; Ryan open to London in-person

notes: Sierra: enterprise AI agent platform co-founded by Bret Taylor (OpenAI board chair, ex-Salesforce co-CEO) and Clay Bavor (ex-Google Labs). Agent Strategist scopes/builds/ships AI agents with PMs and engineers - agentic AI = Ryan's top-choice. London office, in-person.
